training_data_summary: No learned training data. Classical algorithmic inpainting method available through OpenCV's `cv2.INPAINT_TELEA` flag.
painting_or_art_representation: Not applicable because the method is not trained on image data.
known_domain_gap: No learned painting-domain bias, but limited semantic reasoning. Works best for thin/local damage and struggles with large missing structures or complex painterly texture.
bias_risk: Low training-data bias risk; high methodological limitation risk for semantic or historically faithful restoration.
planned_role: Classical deterministic baseline for the full 50-painting subset
notes: Keep as the first model in the 50-painting phase because it is fast, deterministic, reproducible, and already validated in the 3-painting pilot.

training_data_summary: Paper reports Big LaMa was trained on a subset of 4.5M images from the Places-Challenge dataset. Architecture uses Fast Fourier Convolutions and large-mask training.
painting_or_art_representation: Likely indirect or limited. Places-Challenge is scene-oriented rather than painting-restoration-specific.
known_domain_gap: Likely domain gap for historical paintings, brushstroke continuity, abstraction/surrealism, and conservation-style restoration. May still be useful for large masks and structured regions.
bias_risk: Medium. Training data is more transparent than closed models, but not art-restoration-specific.
mask_format: Model-specific binary mask; confirm convention before implementation.
access_cost_notes: Free; local execution depending on setup.
planned_role: First pretrained open inpainting model after OpenCV baseline
notes: Prioritize after OpenCV 50 run. Audit implementation details and mask convention before integration.

training_data_summary: Model card describes a latent text-to-image diffusion inpainting model; Stable Diffusion v1 training used LAION-2B (en) and subsets. Inpainting model adds mask/image conditioning.
painting_or_art_representation: May contain some art-like images through web-scale image-text data, but not controlled painting-restoration data.
known_domain_gap: Can generate plausible but non-ground-truth content. Strong hallucination risk for large missing regions, especially faces, architecture, symbolic scenes, or abstraction.
bias_risk: Medium/high due web-scale image-text data, prompt dependence, and possible demographic/style/cultural bias.
mask_format: Pipeline-specific binary mask; confirm white/black damaged-region convention.
access_cost_notes: Free local possible but GPU recommended.
planned_role: Generative model candidate for multi-seed uncertainty analysis after deterministic comparison works
notes: Do not add before OpenCV and LaMa are stable. Prompt and seed protocol must be fixed.

training_data_summary: SDXL is a larger latent diffusion text-to-image model with improved architecture over previous Stable Diffusion versions; SDXL inpainting variants add mask-based inpainting capability.
painting_or_art_representation: Likely broader visual/style coverage than older SD models, but still not restoration-specific unless explicitly fine-tuned.
known_domain_gap: May over-generate visually convincing but historically incorrect content. Higher visual quality can hide evaluation failure.
bias_risk: Medium/high due broad generative training data and limited task-specific transparency.
mask_format: Pipeline-specific binary mask; confirm white/black damaged-region convention.
access_cost_notes: Local GPU likely needed; cloud possible.
notes: Evaluate only after deciding whether regular Stable Diffusion Inpainting is sufficient for uncertainty experiments.

training_data_summary: Closed commercial image-editing model/service. Public documentation supports image edits with masks, but detailed training-data composition is not available.
painting_or_art_representation: Unknown. Must be discussed as limited transparency.
known_domain_gap: Mask behavior is prompt-guided and may not follow exact mask shape. Reproducibility is weaker because service behavior, model versions, and availability can change.
bias_risk: Unknown/medium-high due closed training data and limited auditability.
planned_role: Optional closed commercial comparison, not core reproducible model
notes: Keep optional. Use only if time/cost/reproducibility constraints are acceptable.
